Protein names: Ribosomal RNA small subunit methyltransferase F (EC 2.1.1.178) (16S rRNA m5C1407 methyltransferase) (rRNA (cytosine-C(5)-)-methyltransferase RsmF) (rRNA small subunit methyltransferase RsmF) (tRNA (cytosine(49)-C(5))-methyltransferase) (EC 2.1.1.-)
Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, RsmB/NOP family
Domain [CC]: DOMAIN: Contains an N-terminal SAM-binding catalytic domain and a C-terminal PUA-like domain, which is probably involved in RNA binding. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:16793063}.
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. RsmB/NOP family. {ECO:0000255|HAMAP-Rule:MF_01579, ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=cytidine(1407) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 5-methylcytidine(1407) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42756, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10223, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10224, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74483, ChEBI:CHEBI:82748; EC=2.1.1.178; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:16678201}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42757; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:16678201}; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=cytidine(49) in tRNA precursor + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 5-methylcytidine(49) in tRNA precursor + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:54140, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:13804, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:13805, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74483, ChEBI:CHEBI:82748; Evidence={ECO:0000305|PubMed:39495928}; PhysiologicalDirection=left-to-right; Xref=Rhea:RHEA:54141; Evidence={ECO:0000305|PubMed:39495928};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates the cytosine at position 1407 (m5C1407) of 16S rRNA (PubMed:16678201). In vitro, methylates the assembled 30S subunit, but not naked 16S rRNA or the 70S ribosome (PubMed:16678201). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:16678201}.; FUNCTION: In addition, during cellular stress, methylates the cytosine at position 49 (m5C49) of the tyrosine transfer RNA (tRNA Tyr-QUA-II). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:39495928}.

Protein names: Ribosomal RNA small subunit methyltransferase F (EC 2.1.1.-) (EC 2.1.1.178) (rRNA (cytosine-C(5)-)-methyltransferase RsmF)
Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, RsmB/NOP family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. RsmB/NOP family. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01023}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=cytidine(1400) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 5-methylcytidine(1400) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:47732, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11892, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11893, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74483, ChEBI:CHEBI:82748; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:20558545}; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=cytidine(1404) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 5-methylcytidine(1404) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:47736, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11894, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11895, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74483, ChEBI:CHEBI:82748; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:20558545}; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=cytidine(1407) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 5-methylcytidine(1407) in 16S rRNA + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:42756, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10223, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:10224, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:74483, ChEBI:CHEBI:82748; EC=2.1.1.178; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:20558545};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Specifically methylates the cytosines at positions 1400 (m5C1400), 1404 (m5C1404) and 1407 (m5C1407) of 16S rRNA. C1400, C1404 and C1407 are methylated in a 30S subunit substrate, but only C1400 and C1404 are methylated when naked 16S rRNA is the substrate. Methylation by RsmF may facilitate growth at temperatures outside the optimal growth temperature. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:20558545}.
